violations.description: Food supplies. — --- Many items, lettuce, onions, cabbage, in reach-in and prep cooler had gone bad.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items in reach-in and prep cooler not dated.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. - Fryer not under hood.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Dish racks need to be deep cleaned or replaced. - Inside of prep cooler and reach-in needs to be cleaned.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. - Found dishwasher at 0ppm CL
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Floor has cracks in tiles.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. - Bottle found without label.
